diagrams.title: 1D Array Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how elements are stored contiguously in memory with indices
diagrams.purpose: Understanding contiguous memory allocation and index-based access in arrays

diagrams.title: 2D Array Row-Major Storage
diagrams.description: Visualizes 2D array stored in linear memory using row-major order
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how multidimensional arrays are mapped to linear memory

diagrams.title: Structure vs Union Memory
diagrams.description: Compares memory allocation between structure and union
elements: Struct: int a (bytes 0-3), char b (bytes 4), padding (bytes 5-7) = 8 bytes total
Union: int a (bytes 0-3), char b (bytes 0), shared location = 4 bytes total
Structure: all members get separate space
Union: all members share same space
diagrams.purpose: Understanding memory efficiency differences between structures and unions

diagrams.title: Dynamic Array Allocation Process
diagrams.description: Shows steps in dynamic memory allocation for arrays
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the lifecycle of dynamically allocated arrays and memory management
